title: Zelensky Says U.S. Is Conditioning Ukraine’s Security Guarantees on Donbas Surrender
summary_full: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine said that President Trump “still chooses a strategy of putting more pressure on the Ukrainian side.”
summary_public: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine said that President Trump “still chooses a strategy of putting more pressure on the Ukrainian side.”

UA.label: negative
UA.evidence: Ukraine’s Security Guarantees on Donbas Surrender
